data.body: Test contract frozen before code: authoritative contract is the ticket AC (lizard imported through guard_import(extra="metrics"), per-function and per-file/aggregate true CCN over Python plus one non-Python source, and OptionalDependencyError becomes Unavailable). Preconditions: real temp repo contains Python and JavaScript functions with branch-derived CCN; missing-extra path forces guard_import to raise. Production path: public lizard_complexity.analyze(repo_root) with real lizard for polyglot E2E and a guarded import seam for absence. Tier: unit for deterministic aggregation plus in-process E2E through real lizard because a fake one tier lower cannot prove polyglot parsing. Observable postconditions: deterministic repo-relative function records, file totals and global total/max; exact Unavailable reason/accruing_since. Negative control: straight-line functions remain CCN 1 while branching functions are CCN 2. CI gate: make test (tests must execute, no skip). Stateful collateral/recovery/fault injection: N/A; analyzer is read-only.
